'''zanobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huangana|huangana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huangana|huangana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zanobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zænebeth|zænebeth]] || [[word:zænebej|zænebej]] || [[word:zænebesh|zænebesh]] || [[word:zænebe|zænebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanonoboth|zanonoboth]] || [[word:zanonoboj|zanonoboj]] || [[word:zanonobosh|zanonobosh]] || [[word:zanonobo|zanonobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanoboth|zanoboth]] || [[word:zanoboj|zanoboj]] || [[word:zanobosh|zanobosh]] || [[word:zanobo|zanobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanofboth|zanofboth]] || [[word:zanofboj|zanofboj]] || [[word:zanofbosh|zanofbosh]] || [[word:zanofbof|zanofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanobotho|zanobotho]] || [[word:zanobojo|zanobojo]] || [[word:zanobosho|zanobosho]] || [[word:zanoboko|zanoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanoboth|zanoboth]] || [[word:zanoboj|zanoboj]] || [[word:zanobosh|zanobosh]] || [[word:zanobo|zanobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanobothol|zanobothol]] || [[word:zanobojol|zanobojol]] || [[word:zanoboshol|zanoboshol]] || [[word:zanobokol|zanobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanobothotho|zanobothotho]] || [[word:zanobojojo|zanobojojo]] || [[word:zanoboshosho|zanoboshosho]] || [[word:zanoboko|zanoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanobothon|zanobothon]] || [[word:zanobojon|zanobojon]] || [[word:zanoboshon|zanoboshon]] || [[word:zanobokon|zanobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanobothoro|zanobothoro]] || [[word:zanobojoro|zanobojoro]] || [[word:zanoboshoro|zanoboshoro]] || [[word:zanobokoro|zanobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
